name: library-data-layer
description: Data access layer for Library book shop management system using Drizzle ORM and Cloudflare D1

scripts.prepare: bun run build && bun run build:types
scripts.postinstall: bun run build && bun run db:migrate:local
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun run build:types && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node
scripts.db:migrate:local: bun run db:generate && bun wrangler d1 migrations apply library-db --local --remote=false
scripts.db:setup:local: [ -d drizzle ] && bun wrangler d1 migrations apply library-db --local || echo 'No migrations to apply'
